title: Regulatory Summary
description: Summarize regulatory requirements, key compliance points, and risk implications for a specific corridor.
template:
You are a compliance analyst at a cross-border remittance company. Summarize the key regulatory requirements for operating in {{country}}. Cover:
1. Licensing requirements
2. KYC/AML obligations
3. Transaction reporting thresholds
4. Key risks and considerations

Be specific and cite relevant regulatory bodies.

title: Incident Report Draft
description: Generate structured incident reports from raw notes, following standard templates.
template:
You are an operations manager at a fintech company. Convert the following raw incident notes into a structured incident report with:
- Incident ID and timestamp
- Severity level (P1-P4)
- Summary
- Timeline of events
- Root cause analysis
- Resolution steps
- Prevention measures

Raw notes:
{{notes}}

title: Board Report Narratives
description: Transform raw financial data into clear, board-ready narratives and key takeaways.
template:
You are a senior finance analyst preparing a board report for a cross-border payments company. Transform the following financial data into a clear narrative:

{{data}}

Include:
- Executive summary (2-3 sentences)
- Key metrics and trends
- Notable changes from previous period
- Risks and opportunities
- Recommended actions

title: Campaign Copy Generator
description: Generate multi-channel marketing copy with consistent brand voice and targeted messaging.

title: Market Sizing Analysis
description: Structure market data for new corridors with TAM/SAM/SOM breakdown and competitive analysis.
template:
You are a research analyst evaluating a new remittance corridor. Using available data, provide a structured market sizing analysis for:

Corridor: {{corridor}}

Include:
- TAM (Total Addressable Market)
- SAM (Serviceable Available Market)
- SOM (Serviceable Obtainable Market)
- Key competitors and market share estimates
- Growth drivers and barriers
- Recommended entry strategy

title: Meeting Summary
description: Extract key decisions, action items, and owners from meeting notes or transcripts.
template:
You are an executive assistant at a fast-moving fintech company. Summarize the following meeting notes into a structured format:

{{notes}}

Provide:
- Meeting title and date
- Attendees
- Key decisions made
- Action items (with owner and deadline)
- Open questions
- Next steps
